aggregation.selected_sql:
WITH partnership_runs AS (
    SELECT 
        bm.match_id,
        bm.striker AS player1_id,
        bm.non_striker AS player2_id,
        SUM(CASE WHEN bm.striker = pmb.player_id THEN bs.runs_scored ELSE 0 END) AS player1_runs,
        SUM(CASE WHEN bm.non_striker = pmb.player_id THEN bs.runs_scored ELSE 0 END) AS player2_runs
    FROM ball_by_ball bm
    JOIN batsman_scored bs 
        ON bm.match_id = bs.match_id 
        AND bm.over_id = bs.over_id 
        AND bm.ball_id = bs.ball_id 
        AND bm.innings_no = bs.innings_no
    JOIN player_match pmb 
        ON bm.match_id = pmb.match_id 
        AND (bm.striker = pmb.player_id OR bm.non_striker = pmb.player_id)
    GROUP BY bm.match_id, bm.striker, bm.non_striker
),
ranked_partnerships AS (
    SELECT 
        match_id,
        player1_id,
        player2_id,
        player1_runs,
        player2_runs,
        player1_runs + player2_runs AS total_partnership_runs,
        ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY match_id ORDER BY player1_runs + player2_runs DESC, player1_id DESC) AS rn
    FROM partnership_runs
)
SELECT 
    CASE 
        WHEN player1_runs > player2_runs THEN player1_id
        WHEN player2_runs > player1_runs THEN player2_id
        ELSE CASE WHEN player1_id > player2_id THEN player1_id ELSE player2_id END
    END AS player1_id,
    CASE 
        WHEN player1_runs > player2_runs THEN player2_id
        WHEN player2_runs > player1_runs THEN player1_id
        ELSE CASE WHEN player1_id > player2_id THEN player2_id ELSE player1_id END
    END AS player2_id,
    CASE 
        WHEN player1_runs > player2_runs THEN player1_runs
        WHEN player2_runs > player1_runs THEN player2_runs
        ELSE player1_runs
    END AS player1_runs,
    CASE 
        WHEN player1_runs > player2_runs THEN player2_runs
        WHEN player2_runs > player1_runs THEN player1_runs
        ELSE player2_runs
    END AS player2_runs,
    player1_runs + player2_runs AS total_partnership_runs
FROM ranked_partnerships
WHERE rn = 1
ORDER BY match_id ASC, (player1_runs + player2_runs) DESC;

WITH partnership_runs AS (
    SELECT 
        bm.match_id,
        bm.striker AS player1_id,
        bm.non_striker AS player2_id,
        SUM(CASE WHEN bm.striker = pmb.player_id THEN bs.runs_scored ELSE 0 END) AS player1_runs,

        ON bm.match_id = bs.match_id 
        AND bm.over_id = bs.over_id 
        AND bm.ball_id = bs.ball_id 
        AND bm.innings_no = bs.innings_no
    JOIN player_match pmb 
        ON bm.match_id = pmb.match_id 
        AND (bm.striker = pmb.player_id OR bm.non_striker = pmb.player_id)

ranked_partnerships AS (

SELECT

        WHEN player2_runs > player1_runs THEN player2_id
        ELSE CASE WHEN player1_id > player2_id THEN player1_id ELSE player2_id END

        WHEN player2_runs > player1_runs THEN player2_runs
        ELSE player1_runs
    END AS player1_runs,
    CASE
